parameters.content:
### Supabase DDL — run once in SQL editor
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidates (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  candidate_email TEXT NOT NULL,
  stage TEXT,
  score INT,
  fingerprint TEXT,
  requisition_id TEXT,
  notes JSONB,
  screening JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assessment_sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  gmail_thread_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  candidate_email TEXT NOT NULL,
  current_phase INT DEFAULT 1,
  max_phases INT DEFAULT 5,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'assessment',
  screening JSONB,
  score INT,
  requisition_id TEXT,
  fingerprint TEXT,
  cv_plaintext TEXT,
  last_question_sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assessment_questions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES assessment_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  phase INT NOT NULL,
  question_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  answer_text TEXT,
  received_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  response_time_seconds INT,
  is_too_fast BOOLEAN,
  ai_likelihood REAL,
  ai_reason TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_log (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  candidate_email TEXT NOT NULL,
  event_id TEXT,
  status TEXT
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_errors (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  ts TEXT,
  workflow TEXT,
  message TEXT,
  node TEXT
);
```
Credentials: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, GEMINI_API_KEY.
